commands.summary: [AC-1] Findings: modals didn't trap focus (16 reachable tabbables behind an open dialog), no focus restoration on close, track-switcher menu not keyboard-dismissable
[AC-2] src/App.tsx: background marked inert while a modal is open; useReturnFocus restores focus to the trigger; track switcher closes on Escape (focus to toggle) and outside click
[AC-2] Verified live: tabbables outside an open dialog 16 -> 0; focus returns to trigger; switcher dismisses via Escape + outside click; no console errors
[AC-3] scripts/validate-accessibility.mjs: 6 -> 10 tripwire checks (inert background, focus return, switcher dismissal, multi-select checkbox semantics)
[AC-3] Test hygiene: vite.config.ts excludes Tauri build-copied test files under src-tauri/** (true count 56 tests, 3 files)
[AC-3] npm run validate:a11y (10 checks), npm test (56 passed), npm run build all pass
[AC-4] Out of scope for this overlay/menu iteration; captured as a follow-up in the audit and audits/index.md 'Next Recommended Audit'.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
